title: Diagnose setup token rejection
description: Admin login rejects a freshly read setup token from the running backend container. Verify the UI auth proxy path, backend target, and token comparison behavior, then fix the failing path.
close_reason: Confirmed token rejection was caused by one-time setup-token rotation and a misconfigured host-side 3010 dev proxy; restarted 3010 with UI_API_PROXY_TARGET=http://127.0.0.1:8080.

title: Block sidebar navigation before login
description: Unauthenticated users can click left navigation links while the admin login screen is visible. Disable or guard sidebar navigation until login succeeds.
close_reason: Sidebar navigation is disabled on the admin login route and covered by shell/renderer tests.

description: Investigate why http://localhost:3001 still shows the admin login as a wide panel instead of the floating login window and update runtime/docs/code as needed.
close_reason: Rebuilt the local UI container and bumped immutable UI asset query strings to admin-login-2 so browsers fetch the floating-window login CSS.

title: Complete admin login flow

title: Document n8n priority score normalization
description: Update the necessary GroupScout markdown guides so setup, how-to, testing, developer, troubleshooting, and nice-to-know docs explain the /n8n/webhook PriorityScore 0-10 contract and legacy 0-100 normalization.
close_reason: Updated centralized setup, n8n how-to, testing, troubleshooting, developer/API, and nice-to-know docs to document the /n8n/webhook PriorityScore 0-10 contract, legacy 0-100 normalization, and defensive Slack/email display clamping.

title: Clamp n8n webhook lead scores to Slack scale
description: External pre-enriched leads posted to /n8n/webhook can supply PriorityScore values such as 98, while Slack/email render scores as /10. Normalize or validate webhook scores so Slack cannot show impossible values, and update the API docs if the accepted range changes.
close_reason: Backend now normalizes /n8n/webhook PriorityScore values to the Slack/internal 0-10 scale before storage and notification, defensively clamps lead notification display scores, and docs/OpenAPI no longer describe webhook scores as 0-100-only.

title: Run normal n8n pipeline

close_reason: Executed n8n workflow groupscout-n8n-normal-run-20260525T221616Z against POST /run. n8n returned HTTP 200 with body 'Pipeline completed successfully'. Backend completed enrichment, logged sent leads to Slack count=8, and DB shows 8 leads marked notified.
